meta.title: Expert Panel: Optimizing BizOps with AI
meta.description:
Welcome to DeepLearning.AI Expert Panel - Optimizing BizOps with AI - in partnership with FourthBrain. Join us for a discussion from AI leaders to find out how AI is deployed at their companies and across industries to improve business efficiency.

40-min Panel discussion + 20-min Q&A. We will be taking questions from Slido.

Speakers:
-Patrick Bangert, VP of Artificial Intelligence, Samsung SDSA (https://www.linkedin.com/in/patrick-bangert-452ab013/)
-Greg Coquillo, Linkedin Top Voice for Data Science and AI (https://www.linkedin.com/in/greg-coquillo/)
-Anirban Deb, Head of Data Science and Machine Learning, Uber Freight (https://www.linkedin.com/in/anirbanbiswajitdeb/)
-Moderator: Sandhya Simhan, Director of Marketing, DeepLearning.AI 

The panel will be discussing topics including:
-Real-life use cases of optimizing bizops with AI
-Practical approach to implement AI with limited resources for operational efficiency
-Challenges faced while building talent/competency required for implementing AI/ML
-Strategies to get buy-in from skeptical bosses
-Untapped/exciting opportunities for business to look at for a good ROI for a first AI project
-Framework for envisioning a new AI applications use case
-Useful strategies for deploying an AI project


To learn more about us, 
DeepLearning.AI: https://www.deeplearning.ai/
FourthBrain:https://www.fourthbrain.ai/
